data.title: 安装包现已支持自定义目录，旧版本用户需要先卸载，再安装新版本
data.titleEn: Installer now supports custom directory, existing users need to uninstall old version before installing new version
data.content: 安装包现已支持自定义目录，旧版本用户需要先卸载，再安装新版本。
data.contentEn: Installer now supports custom directory, existing users need to uninstall old version before installing new version.

data.title: 双语公告与更新日志已上线
data.titleEn: International announcements and release notes are now live
data.content: 已支持双语公告和更新日志
data.contentEn: Bilingual announcements and release notes are now supported
